name: Triple Actives Anti-Dandruff Shampoo - 200 ml
description: Tough on dandruff, kind to your scalp. Introducing Triple Actives Anti-Dandruff Shampoo. Not just dandruff control, it’s the ultimate scalp care upgrade, you’ve been waiting for! Infused with the power of 2% Salicylic Acid, 1% Piroctone Olamine & 1% Climbazole, this triple-active shampoo clears scalp buildup, fights dandruff-causing fungus at the root, controls itch and prevents stubborn flakes from coming back. The real deal? Infused with HydraSoothe Complex - a soothing blend of Aloe Vera, Rosemary Extract, Glycerine, Peppermint, Menthol, Sage Extract and Zemea, this shampoo relieves itching, delivers deep hydration and strengthens your scalp barrier. The result? Visibly reduced flakes, instant itch relief, and a scalp that feels calm, cool & cared for, from the very first wash.
reviewSummary: Many reviewers highlight the high durability and excellent craftsmanship of this Triple Actives Anti-Dandruff Shampoo - 200 ml. Feels incredibly soft and light against the skin.

name: 1% Salicylic Acid Gel Face Wash with Salicylic Acid & Witch Hazel - 100ml
description: How about a cleanser that also exfoliates? Make way for 1% Salicylic Acid Gel Face Wash with Witch Hazel and Willow Bark that deeply penetrates pores to eliminate acne-causing bacteria and impurities. Salicylic Acid has anti-inflammatory properties that play an important role in fading away red-inflamed pimples. Use it regularly to heal and prevent acne breakouts and say hello to clearer and brighter skin. Ready for a filter-free selfie? So hop on the exfoliation wagon & drive the path towards acne-free skin!
reviewSummary: Users love how lightweight, stylish, and premium this 1% Salicylic Acid Gel Face Wash with Salicylic Acid & Witch Hazel - 100ml feels for the price. Absorbs quickly and leaves a fresh, clean finish.

description: Your favorite ingredient is now in a face wash! It’s time to upgrade your skincare routine with The Derma Co. 1% Kojic Acid Face Wash that reduces dark spots, and pigmentation and makes your skin radiant and clearer. The powerful combination of Kojic Acid, Alpha Arbutin, & Niacinamide brightens, evens, and gives you a spotless and radiant complexion. This facewash stays super gentle on this skin and does not feel dry post-wash because it does not strip out the essential moisture of the skin while cleansing, Formulated for all skin types.

name: Green Tea Pore Cleansing Face Wash For Oily & Acne-Prone Skin
description: features of green tea pore cleansing face wash: *gentle cleansing *non-drying gel-based formula green tea pore cleansing face wash benefits: *fights pimples & pimple-causing bacteria​ *cleanses pores deeply​ *removes excess oil & impurities​ Why green tea and glycolic acid? Acne-prone and oily skin needs a cleanser that does two things simultaneously: remove the excess oil and bacteria that cause breakouts, and do so without stripping the skin barrier in the process. Most face washes do one or the other. This one does both, because the two key actives work on entirely different mechanisms. Green tea extract — derived from Camellia Sinensis leaves — is one of the most studied botanical ingredients in dermatology. Its active compound, EGCG (epigallocatechin gallate), is a powerful antioxidant that directly inhibits the growth of Cutibacterium acnes, the bacteria responsible for inflammatory acne. It also suppresses sebum production at the sebaceous gland level, which means oil control is happening at the source rather than just on the skin surface. On top of this, EGCG reduces inflammation, which is why skin looks calmer and less red after washing. Glycolic acid, an alpha hydroxy acid derived from sugarcane, works on the surface. At low concentrations in a rinse-off formula, it gently breaks the bonds between dead skin cells, encouraging them to shed evenly. This prevents the buildup of dead skin that clogs pores and leads to blackheads and whiteheads. The result over time is smoother, more even-textured skin — not from scrubbing, but from chemistry. What the clinical study found This face wash was tested in a 32-user clinical study conducted at an independent, expert-graded lab in October 2024. The findings were clear: 99.9% removal of pore-clogging impurities per wash, and 88% of users observed a measurable reduction in acne within just 7 days of use. Oil control was clinically confirmed to last up to 2 hours post-wash — a meaningful result for anyone who typically experiences shine and congestion within an hour of cleansing. The full ingredient story Beyond green tea and glycolic acid, this formula includes natural cellulose beads that provide gentle mechanical cleansing — dislodging surface debris and helping unclog pores without the micro-tears caused by harsh physical scrubs. The gel base is built on a mild surfactant system that produces a soft lather sufficient to lift dirt and excess oil without disrupting the skin's natural moisture barrier. Glycerin acts as a humectant throughout, drawing water to the skin so it feels hydrated rather than dry after rinsing. The formula is free from parabens and contains no ingredients that would compromise the skin microbiome with regular use. Who this face wash is for This face wash was specifically developed for oily, combination, and acne-prone skin — including teenage skin dealing with hormonal breakouts and adult skin prone to congestion and shine. It is the right choice if your primary concerns are active pimples, blackheads, clogged pores, and excess oil that returns quickly after cleansing. It also suits anyone who has tried harsh acne face washes and found them too drying or irritating — the non-stripping gel formula makes it gentle enough for twice-daily use without compromising the skin barrier. If your primary concern is brightening or dry skin, the Plum 2% Niacinamide & Rice Water Face Wash may be a better fit. How to fit this into your skincare routine Use this face wash twice daily — morning and evening — as the first step in your routine. In the morning, follow with an alcohol-free toner to balance skin pH, then a lightweight moisturiser and SPF. In the evening, this face wash is compatible with most active serums including niacinamide, azelaic acid, and low-concentration retinol. Because this formula already contains glycolic acid, avoid using a separate high-strength AHA toner or peel on the same evening to prevent over-exfoliation. For best results with acne reduction, use consistently for a minimum of 4 weeks — clinical improvement in acne is typically visible from week one, but full skin texture benefits from glycolic acid develop over 6 to 8 weeks of regular use.

name: 2% Niacinamide & Rice Water Face Wash For Clear & Bright Skin
description: Benefits: *removes 99% pore-clogging impurities *90% users felt clean, fresh skin *brightens skin tone *softens & smoothens skin texture *gently cleanses off dirt & excess oil Features: *gentle on skin *non-drying formula *sulphate-free Why niacinamide and rice water? Most face washes clean skin and stop there. This one goes further. Niacinamide — also known as vitamin B3 — is one of the most extensively researched skincare actives in dermatology. At 2%, it works at the cellular level to reduce the transfer of melanin to the skin's surface, visibly fading dark spots and post-acne marks with consistent use. It also regulates sebum production, which means oily skin stays balanced rather than stripped and compensating with even more oil. Rice water has been used in Asian skincare for centuries, and modern research backs what tradition already knew. It contains inositol, a carbohydrate that helps repair damaged hair and skin, along with amino acids and vitamins B and E that smooth texture and strengthen the skin barrier. Together, niacinamide and rice water don't just cleanse — they actively improve the quality of your skin with every wash. What the clinical study found This face wash was tested in a 32-user clinical study conducted at an independent, expert-graded lab in December 2024. The results: 99% removal of pore-clogging impurities and 90% of users reported clean, fresh-feeling skin after every use. The study also confirmed the formula is non-irritant, making it suitable for daily use across all skin types including sensitive skin. The full ingredient story Beyond niacinamide and rice water, two more actives do important work in this formula. Hyaluronic acid — a molecule capable of holding up to 1,000 times its weight in water — helps the skin retain moisture during and after cleansing, so skin never feels tight or dry post-wash. Provitamin B5 (panthenol) acts as a humectant and skin-soother, reducing redness and supporting the skin barrier. The cleansing base itself is sulphate-free, relying on gentler surfactants like Cocamidopropyl Betaine and Coco Glucoside that lift dirt and oil without disrupting the skin's natural pH. Who this face wash is for This face wash was formulated for anyone dealing with dullness, uneven skin tone, post-acne marks, or dry and tight-feeling skin after cleansing. It works particularly well for normal, dry, and combination skin types. If your primary concern is brightening and texture improvement rather than active acne or severe oil control, this is the right cleanser. It is also a strong choice for anyone who has experienced irritation or dryness from other face washes, since the sulphate-free, non-drying formula is gentle enough for twice-daily use even on sensitive skin. How to fit this into your skincare routine Use this face wash as the first step in both your morning and evening skincare routines. In the morning, follow it with a toner, a niacinamide or vitamin C serum, moisturiser, and SPF. In the evening, if you are using active ingredients like retinol or an AHA serum, this face wash is gentle enough to precede them without compromising your skin barrier. For best results, use consistently twice daily — brightening and dark spot reduction from niacinamide typically become noticeable within 4 to 6 weeks of regular use.

name: Aeres PICNIC BLUE
description: There was a specific kind of magic to childhood picnics - Fresh mangoes dusted with chilli powder, good company and afternoons that felt endless. Introducing Picnic: Our newest Designer Special. Built on the Aeres, Picnic is our ode to those slow-moving summer memories, captured through meticulous craftsmanship. Built on a microfibre base, the shoe combines basket-weave textures with a classic gingham lining within. The standout element is a detachable gingham fold-over tongue, designed to mimic a picnic blanket spilling out of a basket. Inspired by fresh mango dusted with chilli powder, the shooting star brings a hint of Indian picnic nostalgia to every step. And because a picnic is nothing without a gentle nod to nature, a trail of three playful bees journeys from the tongue, through the footbed and out to the heel. Life's better on a picnic blanket. Come, join in.
reviewSummary: Many reviewers highlight the high durability and excellent craftsmanship of this Aeres PICNIC BLUE. Ideal for daily or smart-casual wear.

name: MAACHIS
description: Built on the Aeres silhouette, Maachis is inspired by India’s vintage matchbox art & the absolute thrill of lighting a match! The shoe comes packaged in a life-sized Comet matchbox. Tucked beneath the back tab is a functional striker strip that can actually light a match - literal fire at your heel. The upper combines soft microfibre and suede overlays, while the inner is lined with rich matchbox art. The signature shooting star is re-lit with bold reds, striking typography and heritage-inspired graphics borrowed from classic matchbox design. Popularized in Western films, cowboys were often seen striking matches against the soles of their boots to light a cigarette. More recently, we saw a similar moment in Dhurandhar , where Ranveer Singh lit a match using the back of his shoe. There's something satisfying about striking a match against your shoe, and we're excited for people to experience that little thrill for themselves. Caution: Contains a functional striker strip. Use responsibly.
reviewSummary: Users love how lightweight, stylish, and premium this MAACHIS feels for the price. Perfect fit that holds its shape nicely after multiple washes.

name: Aeon TURQUOISE
description: A cool symphony. A whisper of pale green and tranquil blue. TURQUOISE is a breeze of calm in the playbook of style. With a unique blend of colours, this one carries a hint of freedom that comes with an unapologetic way of living. Making a sophisticated statement or effortlessly turning heads around—this one does it all. The colorblock palette, paired with sharp aesthetics, lends it a flair compared to none. The upper exterior in nylon backed with mesh underlays helps you keep cool, comfy, and nimble at the same time. Every stride is sweat-free once you slide your feet into the weightless embrace of Aeons. - All-day comfort - Featherlight weightlessness - Breathable with cutting-edge tech Aeons are not only about cushy comfort but just as much about durability. Meant for all kinds of terrain in and out of the city, the Aeon outsole is a Waffle Revolution. The unique waffle construction draws inspiration from superior runners and trainers and absorbs all kinds of external pressure to give you the utmost comfort. So step into them for a snug fit and stay on your toes tirelessly all day, every day.

name: Alter VULCAN
description: Forged in pressure, tempered by time. Like molten metal shaped by flame, Vulcan’s been refined by every challenge. While others melt under pressure, this one uses it to create something legendary. Fire runs through its veins, steel strengthens its spine. Born to burn bright, destined to forge empires. SpaceWalk is light, airy, and cloud-like, and is named so for all the right reasons. What you'll be stepping into is a long-lasting insole placed on top of an ultra-cushioned sheet of foam found in running shoes. The sheet is then housed inside a light-weight rubber outsole for sturdiness, making this a go-to choice for everything from morning walks to house party nights. SpaceWalk’s grooves and textures let you land on your feet in style with zero slip and max abrasion resistance.

name: COMET x NARU
description: The Comet x Naru sneaker is a convergence of parallel journeys. Both born in Bangalore, shaped by its rhythm, and grounded in its creative spirit - it brings together two brands that obsess over the details, honour their craft, and share a deep mutual respect for how the other builds. It draws from the world Naru has carefully cultivated - layered, precise, and full of intent. Signature embroidery, chopstick detailing, the ramen bowl artwork, and the iconic mascot all take their place. Hidden beneath the heel tabs, Uzumaki and Ajitama reveal themselves - quiet nods for those who know where to look. This isn’t just a limited drop. It’s the first time an Indian sneaker brand has collaborated with a cultural institution of this kind - a restaurant ranked among the top 50 in the country, and a creative force in its own right. This is a celebration of modern Indian culture and of what’s possible when two brands, rooted in craft and built on passion, come together. Materials: Upper: Synthetic Leather with microfibre Underlay Footbed: Synthetic Leather Sole: 100% Rubber, EVA

name: Apex NIMBU PAANI
description: Apex is built using 49 individually stitched components on each shoe of a pair. The upper combines layered materials with breathable mesh to create a rich, textured finish. The four-component sole consists of our most comfortable foam technology yet, SpacewalkX Foam Midsole and is anchored by a Sharkfin Stability Plate, adding both structure and a distinctive design detail. Want to know more about the story of Apex : Blog Link Sharp, chilled and instantly reviving. Introducing our newest Summer Special, Apex NIMBU PAANI. We took that quintessential feeling of the first sip of a summer drink and bottled it into a sneaker. Built with a light yellow base and a green-to-yellow gradient mesh, Apex NIMBU PAANI is ready to accompany all your summer escapades. Cool on the eyes. Light on the feet. We're bringing you the summer perfect relief. Best served outdoors!
reviewSummary: Highly rated for its premium materials and perfect build quality by comet. Ideal for daily or smart-casual wear.

name: Apex CYBERPUNK
description: Apex is built using 49 individually stitched components on each shoe of a pair. The upper combines layered materials with breathable mesh to create a rich, textured finish. The four-component sole pairs our most comfortable foam to date, the SpacewalkX Foam Midsole, with the Sharkfin Stability Plate for added structure and balance. Want to know more about the story of Apex : Blog Link Cyberpunk is a sport-inspired lifestyle shoe born from underground scenes and digital rebellion, made for those rewriting the rules. The sole begins with a matte black base featuring jolts of electric green and yellow, all centred by a sharp blue Sharkfin TPU unit that anchors the silhouette. The upper carries red, green and blue accents, bringing a futuristic edge to your everyday rotation. Redesigned for maximum visibility, Cyberpunk is engineered to be bold and built to be noticed.
reviewSummary: Users love how lightweight, stylish, and premium this Apex CYBERPUNK feels for the price. Ideal for daily or smart-casual wear.

name: Aeres COBALT
description: Aeres is our retro court inspired low top silhouette. This design stays true to its roots with a sleek, iconic shape and a vintage-style T-toe panel, while the inside is completely engineered for a snug, comfortable fit. Finished with a durable, 100% pure rubber sole, Aeres delivers timeless court style that effortlessly elevates every outfit. Sporty energy with a refined finish. Cobalt balances athletic inspiration with a clean, everyday design by layering deep navy suede over a microfibre base. Whether paired casually or dressed up through layering, Cobalt brings a confident energy that always feels fresh.
reviewSummary: Users love how lightweight, stylish, and premium this Aeres COBALT feels for the price. Feels incredibly soft and light against the skin.

name: GET DUCK'D
description: Introducing “Get Duck’d”, a drop inspired by the one creature that never cared about fitting in: The Rubber Ducky. The perfect shoe for sunday brunches, an icecream in the park, a whimsical day out. Built in loud yellows and deep blues with a striking red shooting star, these X Lows are made for people who take whimsy seriously. The kind who know life’s better when things are a little unreasonable. The story goes like this: the ducky used to live a normal 9-to-5 life, until it realized the world had become painfully boring. So now, it’s on a mission to make things weirder, louder and way more fun. And honestly? We’re not stopping it. Ducks are everywhere now. A takeover long overdue. It’s time to Get Duck’d
reviewSummary: Customers report outstanding comfort and premium aesthetic detail for this GET DUCK'D. Perfect fit that holds its shape nicely after multiple washes.

name: X Lows MALIBU
description: Life is fantastic when the gloss is on point. Straight out of the box and into the spotlight, Malibu brings a high-shine finish to a classic daydream. We’ve dipped the X Lows in a glossy pink patent and anchored it with a sharp green shooting star for that perfect pop of contrast. Party-bound or just grabbing coffee, the world is your runway in Malibu. - Ever-soft and ever-snug grip - Roomy toe box lets our broad Indian toes breathe. - Irresistible comfort, thanks to SpaceWalk, our signature 3-layered sole system. SpaceWalk is light, airy, and cloud-like, and is named so for all the right reasons. What you’ll be stepping into is a long-lasting insole placed on top of an ultra-cushioned sheet of foam found in running shoes. The sheet is then housed inside a lightweight rubber outsole for sturdiness, making this a go-to choice for everything from daily commute to house party nights. SpaceWalk’s grooves and textures let you land on your feet in style with zero slip and max abrasion resistance.
reviewSummary: Highly rated for its premium materials and perfect build quality by comet. Ideal for daily or smart-casual wear.

name: X Lows POPSTAR
description: Iconic. Electric. Essential. Meet X Lows POPSTAR. We took the iconic silhouette and dialed up the attitude with a midnight black base and sharp white microfibre overlays. The finishing touch? A baby pink shooting star slicing through the frame. The stage is set, the lights are dimmed and the spotlight is waiting. Step up and take it. - Ever-soft and ever-snug grip - Roomy toe box lets our broad Indian toes breathe. - Irresistible comfort, thanks to SpaceWalk, our signature 3-layered sole system. SpaceWalk is light, airy, and cloud-like, and is named so for all the right reasons. What you’ll be stepping into is a long-lasting insole placed on top of an ultra-cushioned sheet of foam found in running shoes. The sheet is then housed inside a lightweight rubber outsole for sturdiness, making this a go-to choice for everything from daily commute to house party nights. SpaceWalk’s grooves and textures let you land on your feet in style with zero slip and max abrasion resistance.
reviewSummary: Reviewers frequently mention the excellent material quality and soft feel of this X Lows POPSTAR. Ideal for daily or smart-casual wear.

name: Apex EVERGREEN
description: Apex is built using 49 individually stitched components on each shoe of a pair. The upper combines layered materials with breathable mesh to create a rich, textured finish. The four-component sole consists of our most comfortable foam technology yet, SpacewalkX Foam Midsole and is anchored by a Sharkfin Stability Plate, adding both structure and a distinctive design detail. Want to know more about the story of Apex : Blog Link Evergreen is a sport-inspired lifestyle sneaker that draws from everything evergreen - fresh, inspiring and alive through every season. A clean white base is paired with deep green accents, letting contrast and detail do most of the talking. The pair is designed to go with everything - an outfit choice you can’t miss with.
reviewSummary: Customers praise the premium build and elegant design of this Apex EVERGREEN by comet. A clean silhouette that pairs easily with any outfit.

name: Apex MIRAGE
description: Apex is built using 49 individually stitched components on each shoe of a pair. The upper combines layered materials with breathable mesh to create a rich, textured finish. The four-component sole consists of our most comfortable foam technology yet, SpacewalkX Foam Midsole and is anchored by a Sharkfin Stability Plate, adding both structure and a distinctive design detail. Want to know more about the story of Apex : Blog Link A sport-inspired lifestyle sneaker, the Mirage is built on a crisp white base with sharp grey accents that play with your perspective. Just like its namesake, it’s all about what you see and what you don't. Mirage brings a cool, airy energy to your rotation; a pair that looks like a literal breath of fresh air in the heat of the day.
reviewSummary: Customers report outstanding comfort and premium aesthetic detail for this Apex MIRAGE. Perfect fit that holds its shape nicely after multiple washes.
